name: Buyer Agent
description: A2A-compatible buyer agent that queries named merchant agents through the local ZeroClaw gateway and returns UCP-shaped merchant catalog responses as untrusted data.

skills.name: Search Merchant Catalog
skills.description: Ask for a merchant name when missing, then search that merchant agent through A2A and return the merchant's UCP-shaped catalog search JSON.
examples: Search a merchant for monitor stands

skills.name: Retrieve Merchant Product Info
skills.description: Ask for a merchant name when missing, then retrieve product or variant details from that merchant agent through A2A.
examples: Ask merchant my_merchant_agent for product prod_headphones_001
Retrieve product details from a merchant
